description_long: This object consists of two mushrooms with pale blue, smooth, dome-shaped caps and slender, white stems. The larger mushroom stands slightly taller and leans gently, while the smaller one is positioned nearby, both emerging from a flat, dark, circular base that resembles soil or a park substrate. The caps have a subtle glossy sheen, with no visible spots or markings, and the stems are straight and unbranched. The gills beneath the caps are not visible from any angle. The overall appearance is clean and stylized, with a soft, almost translucent quality to the caps. The mushrooms are grouped closely together, suggesting a natural cluster growing in an urban green space or landscaped area.
description: A pair of pale blue, smooth-capped mushrooms with slender white stems growing from a dark, flat base. The caps are glossy and dome-shaped, and the mushrooms are closely clustered.
description_view_0: Two mushrooms with pale blue caps and white stems are visible, both emerging from a dark circular base, with the larger mushroom in front and the smaller one behind.
description_view_1: Only the larger mushroom is clearly visible from this angle, showing its full cap and straight stem, with the smaller mushroom mostly hidden behind.
description_view_2: Both mushrooms are visible, with the larger one in the foreground and the smaller one slightly behind, highlighting their close proximity and similar structure.
description_view_3: The mushrooms are viewed from behind, with the stems partially overlapping and the caps aligned, showing the cluster from the opposite side.
